task: Define and red-team AI career parent pilot blueprint

governance_bootstrap.summary: Customer-facing paid content requires legal, red-team, QA, and human decision gates.
Completion evidence records real review results and unresolved risks before launch.

verification.name: ARK reference inspection
verification.command: pdfinfo and rendered page inspection of docs/ARK-Invest_Big-Ideas-2024.pdf
verification.result: Confirmed 163-page landscape report with structured thesis pages, diagrams, charts, citations, and disclosures.

verification.name: pilot blueprint artifact check
verification.command: Inspect the committed blueprint and its page-by-page PDF acceptance criteria
verification.result: Confirmed the artifact defines a user-facing 8-page report contract, visual QA gates, evidence grades, and paid-pilot stop rules.

verification.name: first red-team review
verification.command: Independent Copilot review of page plan and rubric
verification.result: red_team_block; scope, payment proof, and decision linkage were tightened.

verification.name: revised red-team review
verification.command: Independent Copilot verdict on one-decision pilot with 3 prepaying households
verification.result: Ready for limited paid pilot, conditional on offer contract, legal/payment hygiene, ops cap, pass/fail rules, and visible evidence grades.

deploy.result: Documentation is source-of-truth; Mac Mini deployment is not required for this planning artifact.

residual_risk: No customer-facing PDF has been authored or paid pilot launched yet.
Claude/Gemini live calls were unavailable; the independent runtime review used Copilot and Codex, so no false red_team_clear is claimed.
